sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Plane Move
special_mechanics.description: Two-plane battle system allowing free movement to adjacent plane by pressing Light Punch and Light Kick simultaneously

special_mechanics.name: Power Attack
special_mechanics.description: Special attack that knocks opponent to the other plane

special_mechanics.name: Low/High Plane Move Attack
special_mechanics.description: Jump towards opponent on other plane; press punch button for low attack, kick button for high attack

special_mechanics.name: Evasion Attack
special_mechanics.description: Special counterattack technique performed after guarding an opponent's attack

special_mechanics.name: Desperation Move (Fury)
special_mechanics.description: Powerful special move causing massive damage, usable only when life gauge is at 25% and flashing red

special_mechanics.name: Dash Back
special_mechanics.description: Quickly tap lever backwards twice to retreat from opponent

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and fighting system details but no quantitative physics parameters (velocity, acceleration, gravity values) for the Genesis port. Movement is primarily combat-focused rather than platformer movement.
